name: Chatham Lodging Trust
summary: PART I Dollar amounts presented in this Item 1 are in thousands, except per share data. Overview Chatham Lodging Trust (we, us or the Company) was formed as a Maryland real estate investment trust on October 26, 2009. We elected to be taxed as a REIT for federal income tax purposes commencing with our 2010 taxable year. The Company is internally-managed and invests primarily in upscale extended-stay and premium-branded select-service hotels. We had no operations prior to the consummation of our ...
